semanticSummary.explanation: Absolute-positioned order customization overlay with a modal product editor, promotional action card, add-on carousel, and fixed checkout bar.
warnings: Stack-root overlay composition with multiple independently positioned sections.

semanticVerdicts.explanation: Top-right close affordance for the modal overlay.
Tappable promo code action card with icon, label, and arrow affordance.
Primary checkout CTA in the fixed bottom bar.
Inline quantity control for the main order item.
Inline quantity control for a secondary order item.
Inline quantity control for another order item.
Add control for the cutlery add-on row.
CTA for the sauces carousel card.
Icon-only add control on a product card.
Icon-only add control on the promo product card.
